title: On June 7, Zeng Shengwen, chairman of Tianhui Group, led the group’s senior management to an exchange meeting for domestic plastics leaders in Beijing.
contentHtml: On June 7, Tianhui Group Chairman Zeng Shengwen led the group's senior management to attend a plastics industry gathering in Beijing. Big names gathered, including Sinopec, Yanchang Petroleum, Baofeng Energy, and Jiutai Energy, to seek common development and win-win results in harmony!
titleZh: 6月7日，天晖集团董事长曾胜文带领集团高层赴约北京国内塑化翘楚交流会
contentHtmlZh: 6月7日，天晖集团董事长曾胜文带领集团高层参加北京塑化行业聚会，大咖会集，中石化，延长石油，宝丰能源，久泰能源，共谋发展，和谐共赢！
